zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander de Bunbury於1200年出生在英國時，他的父親Patrick de Bunbury25歲，母親Letitia Clemence Fitzhugh22歲。他和Elizabeth Edmond至少有6個兒子。他去世於1250年在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander de Bunbury于1200年出生在英国时，他的父亲Patrick de Bunbury25岁，母亲Letitia Clemence Fitzhugh22岁。他和Elizabeth Edmond至少有6个儿子。他去世于1250年在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bunbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander de Bunbury was born in 1200, in England, his father, Patrick de Bunbury, was 25 and his mother, Letitia Clemence Fitzhugh, was 22. He had at least 6 sons with Elizabeth Edmond. He died in 1250, in Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander de Bunbury est né en 1200, à Angleterre, son père, Patrick de Bunbury, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Letitia Clemence Fitzhugh, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Elizabeth Edmond. Il est décédé en 1250, à Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander de Bunbury 1200 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick de Bunbury 25 und seine Mutter Letitia Clemence Fitzhugh 22. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Edmond mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1250 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Bunbury è nato il nel 1200 nel England, il suo padre, Patrick de Bunbury, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Letitia Clemence Fitzhugh, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Elizabeth Edmond. Morì nel 1250, nel Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander de Bunburyが1200年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Patrick de Bunburyは25歳，母Letitia Clemence Fitzhughは22歳であった。彼はElizabeth Edmondとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1250年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander de Bunbury(이)가 1200년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick de Bunbury(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Letitia Clemence Fitzhugh(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Edmond(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1250년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Bunbury nasceu em 1200, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Patrick de Bunbury, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Letitia Clemence Fitzhugh, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Elizabeth Edmond. Ele faleceu em 1250, em Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander de Bunbury родился в 1200 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Patrick de Bunbury было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Letitia Clemence Fitzhugh, 22. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Elizabeth Edmond. Он умер в 1250 г. в местности сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander de Bunbury nació en 1200, en Inglaterra, su papá, Patrick de Bunbury, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Letitia Clemence Fitzhugh, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Elizabeth Edmond. Murió en 1250, en Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
